title: Fix message box to stay centered and stationary after envelope opens

requirements.text: The letter/message panel revealed after the envelope opens must remain fixed and perfectly centered in the viewport at all times — it must not shift, drift, slide, or animate its position after the reveal. The panel's centering must be enforced with stable, non-animated positioning (e.g., fixed positioning with transform-based centering) so that no keyframe, state change, or re-render can cause it to move from the center of the screen.

quotes: The box carring the message must stay at the middle of the screen and should not move

acceptanceCriteria: After clicking the envelope to open it, the letter/message panel appears exactly centered both horizontally and vertically in the viewport.
The letter panel does not move, drift, or animate its position at any point after it becomes visible.
The panel remains centered regardless of scroll position or any ongoing animations (e.g., star background, envelope flap).
The centering holds across different screen sizes and viewport dimensions.
No CSS transition or keyframe animation affects the `top`, `left`, `right`, `bottom`, or `transform` (translate) properties of the panel after it is shown.

constraints: Do not alter the envelope open/close animation or the wax seal fade effect.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).
nonGoals: Adding new animations or visual effects to the letter panel.
Changing the letter content or typography.
Modifying the star background or backdrop overlay behavior.
